one_time_description: Prior period corrections related to analysis of combined financial statements from previous years for various funders, applicable to periods prior to April 1, 2023
economic_notes: Commercial enterprises include: Marché d'alimentation Manawan inc. (100%), Société de Télécommunications Atikamekw-Cri S.E.C. (16.67%), Manawan Télécommunications Atikamekw S.E.C. (99.99%), Énergie Matawak S.E.C. (37.50%). Non-profit entities combined include Tourisme Manawan, Centre sportif et culturel de Manawan, and Société de développement économique de Manawan.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to non-compliance with SP 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations standard (effective April 1, 2022) — Council did not identify or measure ARO liabilities. Prior period corrections of $7,600,623 recorded. Combined statements include operating fund, enterprise-lease fund, housing fund, and three non-profit organizations. Four GBEs accounted for under modified consolidation method. Tangible capital assets sum of note 17 ($116,148,669) and note 18 ($5,749,743). Deferred revenue includes $12,578,955 funds unused to reinvest - SAC and $3,594,819 funds unused to reinvest - Health Canada shown separately from deferred revenue line. ISC funding of $32,715,617 from accounts receivable note only; full revenue breakdown by line not available in pages provided.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
